home.subtitle: hi! i'm emmy and this is my website. there's pictures of me, stuff about me, AND a slime maker i made. scroll down!! ⬇

about.title: About Me
about.dek: the important stuff you should know
about.heading: hi, i'm Emmy!
about.bio1: i am 8 years old and i live with my family. i love art, slime, and riding my bike really fast down the hill behind our house.
about.bio2: when i grow up i want to be a vet AND an artist so i can paint puppies all day. i made this website myself (with a little help).

pictures.title: My Pictures
pictures.dek: tap any picture to see it big!

players.title: Players 🫧
players.dek: log in to see your slime stats and your friends!

slime.title: Slime Maker ✨
slime.dek: i made a whole game for this!!
slime.ctaTitle: my slime maker is its own whole thing!
slime.ctaText: pick a color, add glitter, toss in charms, and make the coolest slime ever. click the button to play!
